name: Indivilia | You've been caught off guard
description:
"I'm here, rest assured. The sentence that carries everything."

You've been wandering in the surface, trying to find something valuable to sell and make some money for yourself. Luckily (or not), you encountered a cocky and prideful bitch that will toy with you. Well, she might kill you as well.

—

Sup, fellas. I'm here yet again to bring another bot. To be honest, I was working in some new OC but, holy hell, it's quite difficult to make her work well so I decided to bring a non OC bot this time before I upload my next OC. She is Indivilia from Nikke: Goddess of Victory. I tried my best to make her as accurate as possible, and I'll try to improve her personality if it seems a bit off. Well, if you don't play Nikke, you don't need to give a fuck. The scenario is meant to work to whoever wants to interact with her.

Of course, any feedback is welcome and will help me improve her. I don't have any more to add for now, I'll see you later on with my new bot.

Oh, and props to Gloomyowl who made the art.

NOTE: EVERY CHARACTER PORTRAYED ARE ABOVE 18 YEARS!!!!1!!!!1!11!
creator: Linyzakx
